goals.title: Fix PathFinder analyze result page to exactly replace old result layo...
goals.objective: Fix PathFinder analyze result page to exactly replace old result layout with analyze_result_competency_map_simple.html v2 layout; remove old sidebar/progress/evidence/timeline/interview remnants; implement competency detail current/company scores and rationales; define and apply personalized classification criteria for strength/articulate/study based on profile/cover-letter/job evidence; use the HTML guide drawer content directly adapted without emoji glyph breakage; replace emoji icons with stable text/SVG; verify with tests, desktop browser QA, and Antigravity CLI adversarial review loop until score >= 90. Mobile testing is not required.

successCriteria.scenario: happy path for: Fix PathFinder analyze result page to exactly replace old result layout with...
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Replace via revise_criterion with observable happy-path proof for goal 1.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: AnalyzeResultView now renders only CompetencyGap v2; desktop visual QA confirms old selectors .sidebar, .progress-card, #scores, #roadmap, #prep-keywords, #interview-drill are all 0; screenshots under .omo/ulw-loop/competency-map-v2-fix/evidence/screenshots/desktop-result-v2-r2.png and desktop-guide-drawer-v2.png.

successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Replace via revise_criterion with boundary or malformed-input proof for: Fix PathFinder analyze result page to exactly replace old result layout with....
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: LLM prompt and roadmap_processing_competency now define strength/articulate/study criteria, radar_score/job_score thresholds, score_rationale fields, and derive missing required competencies as study with low current score. llm_server pytest: 30 passed.

successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Replace via revise_criterion with regression proof for neighboring behavior after: Fix PathFinder analyze result page to exactly replace old result layout with....
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Verification passed: npm --prefix frontend test -- --run, npm --prefix frontend run build, PLAYWRIGHT_PORT=5179 npm --prefix frontend run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/analyze-flow.spec.js (4 passed), Antigravity adversarial review Score 100/100 PASS in evidence/antigravity-review-1.txt.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/competency-map-v2-fix/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/competency-map-v2-fix/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
